days_1_3.name: Foundation Lock-In
tasks: finalize 8 money page list and audit
days_1_3.kpi_target: system locked, 8 money pages audited, 20-30 internal links added

days_4_7.name: First Production Sprint
days_4_7.kpi_target: 4 money pages upgraded, 1 data asset live, 5 pitches sent

days_8_14.name: Full Deployment
tasks: first content click attack (CTR fixes on pages with impressions)
days_8_14.kpi_target: 8 money pages fully upgraded, 2 data assets, first content click targeted

days_15_21.name: First Evaluation Gate
tasks: evaluate first results (any clicks? replies? indexing movement?)
kill failed outreach channel if 0/20 replies
improve snippets for pages with impressions but 0 clicks
days_15_21.kpi_target: data-driven decisions: kill or intensify based on real outcomes

days_22_30.name: Monthly Review + Next Cycle
tasks: identify first revenue path (monetization or traffic-first)
decide if cleanup test is safe
decide if authority channel is working (keep/kill)
days_22_30.kpi_target: clear monthly report, next money page cluster chosen, revenue path identified

by_day_30: at least 1 money page indexing improvement
minimum_acceptable: daily workflow executing without Qasem input
measurable movement in at least 1 KPI
no spend, no risky SEO, no manual dependency
